title: Immersive Portals Modpack
description: Immersive Portals addons Modpack with mostly mods made by qouteall, the creator of Immersive Portals.
body:
# Immersive Portals Modpack
**THIS IS IN BETA**

## What does this do?
- adds addon mods for Immersive Portals
- you can do stuff like use MiniScaled mod to make little builds
- or you can use stuff like Gravity Changer mod to change your gravity
- oh, and there is also Immersive Portal Gun mod so you can live your best portal 2 dreams

### Other mods
- adds Mouse Tweaks for your convenience
- this modpack adds Sodium for you to not to lag
- also adds Just Enough Items for you to find all your items
- WorldEdit for you to build the best Immersive Portals builds

Here is the [Moddermore](https://moddermore.net/list/MuN_1o9rKeTP) list

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>



- Fabric API
- Geckolib
- Gravity Changer (qouteall fork)
- Immersive Portal Gun
- Immersive Portals
- Just Enough Items
- MiniScaled
- Mouse Tweaks
- Pehkui
- Sodium
- WorldEdit



</details>
